entries.definition: belonging to or occurring in the present time; modern
entries.exampleSentence: The gallery specialises in contemporary art from emerging artists around the world.

entries.definition: living, existing, or happening at the same time as another person or thing
entries.exampleSentence: Charles Dickens was contemporary with Queen Victoria — both lived through the Industrial Revolution.

entries.definition: a person or thing living or existing at the same time as another
entries.exampleSentence: She was highly respected by her contemporaries in the scientific community.
